name: SYN Scan
description: Half-open scan. Sends SYN, reads response, never completes handshake. Fast and stealthy.

name: TCP Connect
description: Full TCP handshake. Works without root privileges but slower and logged by target.

name: UDP Scan
description: Scans UDP ports. Slower than TCP but finds DNS, SNMP, DHCP services.

name: FIN Scan
description: Sends FIN packet. Can bypass simple firewalls that only block SYN.

name: XMAS Scan
description: Sets FIN, PSH, URG flags. Lights up the packet like a Christmas tree.

name: NULL Scan
description: Sends packet with no flags set. Stealthy against some firewalls.

name: ACK Scan
description: Maps firewall rules. Determines which ports are filtered vs unfiltered.

name: Ping Scan
description: Host discovery only. No port scan. Fast way to find live hosts.

name: Version Detection
description: Probes open ports to determine service name and version number.

name: OS Detection
description: Attempts to identify the target operating system via TCP/IP fingerprinting.

name: Aggressive Scan
description: Enables OS detection, version detection, script scanning, and traceroute.

name: Port Range
description: Specify which ports to scan. Examples: -p 22, -p 1-1000, -p U:53,T:80.

name: Top Ports
description: Scan the N most common ports based on nmap frequency data.

name: Fast Scan
description: Scan fewer ports than default. Scans top 100 instead of top 1000.

name: All Ports
description: Scan all 65535 ports. Thorough but slow.

name: Paranoid Timing
description: Extremely slow. Waits 5 minutes between probes. For IDS evasion.

name: Sneaky Timing
description: Slow. 15 second delay between probes. Avoids most IDS triggers.

name: Polite Timing
description: Slows down to consume less bandwidth. 0.4 second delay.

name: Normal Timing
description: Default speed. Balanced between speed and reliability.

name: Aggressive Timing
description: Faster scanning. Assumes a fast and reliable network.

name: Insane Timing
description: Maximum speed. May miss ports on slow networks. Use on LAN only.

name: Skip Host Discovery
description: Treat all hosts as online. Skip ping. Useful when ICMP is blocked.

name: TCP SYN Discovery
description: Send SYN packet to discover hosts. Default port 80.

name: TCP ACK Discovery
description: Send ACK packet to discover hosts. Useful when SYN is filtered.

name: UDP Discovery
description: Send UDP packet to discover hosts. Hits closed ports to trigger ICMP response.

name: Traceroute
description: Trace the hop path to each host after scan.

name: Show Reason
description: Show why each port is in a particular state.

name: Verbose
description: Increase verbosity level. Shows open ports as they are found.

name: Very Verbose
description: Even more verbosity. Shows detailed scan progress.

name: Open Ports Only
description: Only show open ports in results. Reduces noise.

name: Decoy Scan
description: Send scans from spoofed IPs alongside yours. Makes source harder to identify.

name: Fragment Packets
description: Split packets into tiny fragments. May bypass packet inspection firewalls.

name: Append Random Data
description: Add random bytes to packets. Changes packet signature to evade IDS.

name: NSE Script
description: Run Nmap Scripting Engine scripts. Powerful vulnerability detection.

name: Script Arguments
description: Pass arguments to NSE scripts.
